rooms.name: Meadow
rooms.plain_description: A basic combat room with general rewards.
rooms.technical_description: Default room. Use low-stress spawns and broad garden piece reward choices.

rooms.name: Nursery
rooms.technical_description: Flora reward room. Bias rewards toward Flora or plant upgrades.

rooms.name: Burrow
rooms.technical_description: Fauna reward room. Bias rewards toward Fauna or feeding bonuses.

rooms.name: Reliquary
rooms.technical_description: Object reward room. Bias rewards toward Objects or relic modifiers.

rooms.name: Boss Grove
rooms.technical_description: Mini-boss room. Completes MVP run and records bond/journal progress.
